app.title: ADA
app.tagline: Hi! I'm your math buddy. Let's learn together!
welcome.title: Who's learning today?
welcome.subtitle: Select your profile to continue, or create a new one.
welcome.noStudents: No students yet. Create one to get started!
form.interestsLabel: What do you like? (helps us make lessons fun!)
form.error: Could not create profile. Is the server running?
map.lockedHint: Complete ready concepts to unlock more!
map.prereqBlinking: Prerequisites are blinking on the graph!
map.pickTopics: Pick topics to make this lesson fun! (optional)
map.masteredMsg: Great job! You've mastered this concept.
map.lockedMsg: Complete the prerequisite concepts first to unlock this one.
learning.craftingCards: ADA is crafting your lesson cards...
learning.exitConfirm: Exit lesson? Your progress will be lost.
learning.incorrect: Not quite — try the next question!
learning.readyQuiz: Finished reading? Let's test your understanding!
chat.chatSubtitle: {{title}} — Answer ADA's questions to test your understanding
chat.preparingQuestion: ADA is preparing your first question...
assist.title: ADA Helper
assist.subtitle: Ask me anything!
assist.welcome: Hi! I'm here to help you learn.
assist.welcomeHint: Ask me anything about this card!
completion.almostMsg: Good effort on {{title}}. Let's review once more!
error.assistFallback: Sorry, I couldn't respond right now. Try again!
error.checkFallback: Sorry, I couldn't process that. Try again!
error.timeout: The AI is taking too long to respond. Please try again.
error.network: Cannot connect to the server. Please check your connection.
